Catalog highlights

  • Custom PVC patches
  • Cut your very own custom shape
  • Sewable border for easy placement on a shirt
  • Individually Polybagged
  • Up to 4 PMS Colors

Patch options (supplier)

Options and add-ons from the live Distributor Central product page for this SKU. Pricing may change; confirm on your quote.

Over 4 colors ▼

This charge is if your artwork requires more than 4 colors as included in the cost. This charge is per color/per item.

No line choices listed—contact the studio for this add-on.

Backing Options - PVC Patches ▼

Hook & Loop PVC

Backing Options - PVC Patches

This backing has two parts, male and female, and allows the patch to be removed after it is applied to the material. This product has an additional charge of 20% per patch. There is not a set additional charge amount.

Final quote may reflect selected options, proofs, rush, or freight beyond list pricing.
salesToolsHtml:
Pitch this SKU — 3.5" PVC Patch (3D). Lead with use case (uniforms, retail, teams, recognition), then minimums and timeline. Reference included services from “Price includes” in the Description tab when present (e.g. setup, virtual proof, shipping offers).

  • Quote style PVC-PT-3D-35 on proposals and POs.
  • Offer virtual proofs and artwork checks before production.
  • Cross-sell with hats, bags, or jackets for kit programs.
  • For gradient or photo-real art, steer toward dye sublimated or woven; for 3D brand marks, PVC or embroidered.

Approved partners can request internal sell sheets, comparison matrices, and margin guidance from the A Design Line team.
inventoryHtml:
Custom patches are built to order. We do not stock finished inventory for arbitrary reorder without a new run.

Supplier-stated production window: 15 days (not including transit).

Contact the studio for rush feasibility, split shipments, or multi-location drops before placing large orders.

Minimum order quantity: 100 units (per catalog line).
